posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
The request

Allow developers to upload a single Zip file that is used by all view features on the app.

Why?

Some apps are the same across all views so the user can choose which view is most convenient for them.

Currently, a developer will have to upload the same zip file for each view feature, for every new version.

Logging this request on behalf of @kolaai, who posted it here.
